creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
Yes, that works here also.  And someone just posted the same thing at the github issue with an explanation.  Unless that was you?  I also checked the version in my 12.2 jail, and the quotes there are the same as the original in 13.2, so I don't know why it was working there.  In any case, this seems to fix the problem, and it sounds like the real question is why the old quotes ever worked at all.

Thanks,

Denver
